response.text:
REJECT

rationale: Your SoC is 0.10 below your own share threshold (0.70); cluster-wide stress and peer rejections indicate aggregator coordination is the only viable path—direct peer sharing would compromise my minimum reserve requirement during islanded conditions.

system: You are the reactive subroutine of a household energy-coordination agent. Be brief and decisive.
user:
You are reacting to a REQUEST from r0c0. Payload: {'kwh': 0.5, 'urgency': 'urgent'}. Their rationale: SoC frac 0.10 below share threshold; requesting energy via dr_aggregator circle..
Your current policy: sharing_intent=conservative, share_min_soc_frac=0.7, distrusted_peers=['r1c2', 'r3c2', 'r2c1'].
Your latest belief: Islanded with declining SoC despite recent recovery; cluster-wide stress detected. All geographic peers have rejected r2c2 requests and are themselves requesting. Aggregator coordination is only viable path. Reject all peer shares until SoC > 0.70 and grid reconnection confirmed..
Reply with one of ACCEPT / REJECT / COUNTER on the first line, followed by `rationale: <one sentence>`.
